title: Extra Enchantments and Curses
description: A simple mod that adds new enchantments and curses to the game!
body:
# IMPORTANT: ## This mod will receive no further updates from me. You are free to fork it and create your own version # 25 new Enchantments and 9 new Curses This mod adds **25** new Enchantments and **9** new Curses to the game, all with their own unique quirks, uses and mechanics. Every Enchantment and Curse also have their own description thanks to [**Enchantment Descriptions**](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions). Most of them have been translated to the following languages: - English - Spanish - Ukrainian (credits to [**unroman**](https://github.com/unroman) on GitHub) - Simplified Chinese (credits to [**junshengxie**](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/junshengxie/projects) on CurseForge) Certain enchantment or curse values and mechanics may change based on feedback or just general usage and usefulness. Recommendations for new enchatments or curses are welcome and appreciated.
> ### A refreshing take on Minecraft's enchantments > Could I just say how much I love the direction this mod chooses to go with its sort of enchantments? Every enchantment is something I feel would be something Notch himself would have implemented if given the chance. Rather than taking off in a whole new direction, it expands off the ideas of existing enchant "ecosystem," bringing forth a refreshing overhaul. > - [**Typhonidite**](https://github.com/03-JS/Extra-Enchantments-and-Curses/discussions/6) on GitHub # Fully customizable As of version 1.8 and above, every Enchantment and Curse can be customized as much as you like. You can change their maximum level, the items they can be applied to, and much more. It is also fully compatible with [**ModMenu**](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu), which makes the configuration process much easier and more accessible. Here's a small demo & preview of what the config screen is like and what you can do in it:

# Wiki If you want or need more detailed info on any enchantment or curse, check out the Wiki [**here**](https://github.com/03-JS/Extra-Enchantments-and-Curses/wiki). Keep in mind that all Wiki info uses the default config. If you're playing on a server with a custom config, the Wiki won't be of much help. --- [![banner](https://i.imgur.com/Ltg5H6Y.png)](https://shorturl.at/JQN9W)
